sentences.arabic: وَصَلَتْ رِسَالَةٌ غَرِيبَةٌ إِلَى بَيْتِ سَارَةَ.
sentences.translation: Čudno pismo stiglo je u Sarinu kuću.
sentences.translationEn: A strange letter arrived at Sara's house.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنْ عَلَى الرِّسَالَةِ اسْمُ الْمُرْسِلِ.
sentences.translation: Na pismu nije bilo imena pošiljatelja.
sentences.translationEn: There was no sender's name on the letter.

sentences.translation: Sara je otvorila pismo i pažljivo ga pročitala.
sentences.translationEn: Sara opened the letter and read it carefully.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ فِيهَا: شُكْرًا لَكِ عَلَى مَسَاعَدَتِكِ الْأُسْبُوعَ الْمَاضِيَ.
sentences.translation: U njemu je pisalo: Hvala ti na pomoći prošle sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: It said: Thank you for your help last week.

sentences.arabic: فَكَّرَتْ سَارَةُ كَثِيرًا وَلَمْ تَعْرِفْ مَنْ أَرْسَلَهَا.
sentences.translation: Sara je dugo razmišljala ali nije znala ko ju je poslao.
sentences.translationEn: Sara thought for a long time but did not know who sent it.
